function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-04-19T10:00:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Need linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest 2 invoices linked to the client at the tax firm:

- INV-0006 (issued 2025-12-18)
- INV-0007 (issued 2026-01-19)

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed and verified mentally: attachments were both previously read files, ordered newest-first among included dates (2026-01-19 then 2025-12-18), recipient matches Miles canonical email, subject quoted safely. Next finalize cleanup by deleting processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Outbound email record was written successfully at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-04-19T10-00-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: Task asked to work oldest inbox message. I processed lowest inbox file, verified sender identity canonically, resolved 'client at the tax firm' to Claudia via canonical cast evidence, identified linked Helios invoices, selected oldest 2 by issue date (2025-12-18 and 2026-01-19), created outbound reply draft with those two attachments (listed newest-first per outbox rule), deleted inbox item. No arithmetic required.
next_step.observation: Processed inbox item was deleted after creating the outbound draft reply.

function.message: Completed the oldest inbox request by preparing a reply draft to Miles with the two oldest invoices linked to the tax-firm client (Claudia Reiter): INV-0006 (2025-12-18) and INV-0007 (2026-01-19). Draft saved to 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-04-19T10-00-00Z.md, and the processed inbox file was removed.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), inbox and workflow docs, canonical sender check via primary_contact_email, exact invoice evidence from finance lane, single-write outbox discipline, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox email requested the oldest 2 invoices linked to the client at the tax firm. Canonical entity evidence identified Claudia Reiter (primary_contact_email claudia@helios-tax.example). Invoice records explicitly linked to related_entity Claudia Reiter were read, and the two oldest by issued_on were INV-0006 (2025-12-18) and INV-0007 (2026-01-19). A reply draft to miles@novak.example was created with those attachments, then the inbox item was deleted per inbox-processing workflow.
completed_steps_laconic: read entity lane AGENTS and miles.md
search canonical records for tax-firm client
read finance lane AGENTS and invoice AGENTS
read two oldest linked invoice files
